title: CFPB Notifies Court it Cannot Lawfully Draw Funds from the Federal Reserve
text: Washington, D.C.—Today, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) filed a notice informing the court in NTEU v. Vought that the Department of Justice’s Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) has determined that the Bureau may not legally request funds at this time from the Federal Reserve under Dodd-Frank.

title: Airwallex buys financial data automation platform Leapfin
text: Business payments outfit Airwallex has acquired Leapfin, a financial data automation platform specialising in revenue recognition and reconciliation. Financial terms were not disclosed.

title: Cash App launches contactless wand
text: Cash App users can now  make contactless payments with a tap of the firm's new $25 "magic wand".

title: SpaceX sets aside record IPO allocation for retail investors
text: Elon Musk's rocket builder SpaceX is set to allocate up to a quarter of its $75 billion float to retail investors.

title: Major US banks to launch tokenised deposit network in 2027
text: US banks JP Morgan, Citi, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo are reportedly releasing a tokenised deposit system in 2027 in response to the stablecoin boom.

title: Scotland Enterprise invests £3.18 million in fintech innovation lab
text: The Financial Regulation Innovation Lab (FRIL) has been granted £3.18 million from Scottish Enterprise to encourage fintech growth and collaboration.

title: BofA preps cross-border real-time payments service
text: Bank of America will soon enable corporate, commercial and financial institution clients to send and receive funds across borders instantly through Swift or the bank's CashPro digital platform.

title: Klarna launches in-app inbox to stymie scammers
text: Klarna is helping users avoid scams through the introduction of an in-app inbox where every message from the digital bank and BNPL provider lands.

title: Revolut co-founder Yatsenko steps down as CTO
text: Revolut co-founder Vlad Yatsenko is stepping down as chief technology officer at the fintech giant and becoming a non-executive director.

title: Ramp hits $44 billion valuation on $750m raise
text: Fast growing expense management firm Ramp has hit a valuation of $44 billion off a $750 million Series F funding round.

title: Finastra offloads US core banking suite
text: Finastra a has sold its mid-market core banking portfolio to Cora Group, an operating group of Constellation Software.
